description_long: This is a disposable-style coffee cup with a white body and a fitted white plastic lid, commonly used for takeaway beverages. Around the middle, it features a brown cardboard sleeve for insulation, prominently displaying the green Starbucks logo on one side and printed text and checkboxes for drink customization on the other. The cup is cylindrical, tapering slightly towards the base, and the lid has a raised rim with a central drinking spout, though the spout is not visible in these views. The cardboard sleeve wraps around the cup, providing both branding and a functional grip. The surface of the cup appears smooth and slightly glossy, while the sleeve has a matte, textured finish. This object is typical of urban environments, often found in cafes, on sidewalks, or in public trash bins.
description: A white disposable coffee cup with a plastic lid and a brown Starbucks-branded cardboard sleeve, featuring a smooth body and a textured grip area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Starbucks logo centered on the brown cardboard sleeve, with the white lid and cup body clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the edge of the logo and the start of printed text on the sleeve, with the cup's cylindrical shape and lid profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying printed text, checkboxes for drink customization, and the Starbucks emblem on the sleeve, with no logo visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the word 'STARBUCKS' vertically on the sleeve and the drink customization boxes, with part of the logo just out of sight.
